name: com.corrugator.brightness
description: Stream Deck+ plugin for controlling monitor brightness

scripts.build:helper: T=$(mktemp -d) && trap 'rm -rf "$T"' EXIT && swiftc -O -target arm64-apple-macos12.0 -o "$T/h-arm64" helpers/brightness-helper.swift -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit && swiftc -O -target x86_64-apple-macos12.0 -o "$T/h-x86_64" helpers/brightness-helper.swift -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit && lipo -create -output com.corrugator.brightness.sdPlugin/bin/brightness-helper "$T/h-arm64" "$T/h-x86_64"
scripts.pack: npm run prepack:clean && NODE_ENV=production npm run build && npx @elgato/cli pack -f -o dist com.corrugator.brightness.sdPlugin

author: Corrugator
